deferred.reason: INS-FR-080..082 (hipaa.rego, cms_2024_human_review.rego, naic_ai_disclosure.rego) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral guarantees they encode are partially covered today by Core invariants: proposal-mode + four-eyes approval (agent-runtime) and the caller-permission gate satisfy the human-review requirement for every pack-configured agent.

INS-FR-030/040/050 bespoke LangGraph recipes (prior_auth, appeal_analyst, denial_rationale) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (a Core code surface, BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

INS-FR-060 SoR connectors (Facets, HealthEdge, QNXT, Guidewire, Epic FHIR, EDI 837/835/278) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

INS-FR shipped golden sets (pa_golden, appeal_golden, denial_golden) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).
INS-FR-110 label overlays require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.

INS-FR-061 SoR write adapters (Facets PA decision, Guidewire notes, EDI responses) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; all platform-side writes remain proposal-mode.
INS-FR-010 ontology registration awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the semantic models and dataset schemas.
INS-FR-091 typed case schemas await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.
INS-FR-071 confidence calibrator ships as a pipeline seed instead (pa_approval_classifier); Platt-scaling archetype registration awaits experiment-service archetype APIs.
